title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Python apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, installable via npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models, allowing use within LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI client for Ollama, supports code highlighting, RAG, and multi-model chats.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java SDK for Ollama, providing a fluent API to interact with local LLMs in JVM projects.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for Ollama, installable via gem install ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper around Ollama with prompt history, templates, and shell completion.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community extension embedding Ollama models into Camunda BPMN service tasks for AI-driven workflows.

title: ollama-litellm
summary: LiteLLM proxy support for Ollama, allowing OpenAI-compatible endpoints over 100+ local models.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images for Ollama with GPU & CPU variants and docker-compose examples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with local Ollama models and switch models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama, supporting threaded conversations and per-channel model selection.
